# Secrets

Administer vault-backed secret references and secret validation workflows.

## kiri vault

Vault administration.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri vault [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri vault list`](#kiri-vault-list) - Show every vault-shaped env var in the...
- [`kiri vault set`](#kiri-vault-set) - Store a secret under ``<id>:<key>`` in the...

### kiri vault list

Show every vault-shaped env var in the...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri vault list [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project` | Project root (where .env lives). | no |  |  |
| `--prefix` | Vault prefix (default ``KIRIMANA``). | no | KIRIMANA |  |

### kiri vault set

Store a secret under ``<id>:<key>`` in the...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri vault set [OPTIONS] SECRET_ID
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `SECRET_ID` | Secret id - the middle segment of ``${vault:<id>:<key>}`` refs in project YAML. E.g. ``airbyte/salesforce``. | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--key`, `-k` | Which key inside the secret to set (e.g. ``password``, ``config``). | yes |  |  |
| `--from-env` | Read the value from this env var instead of prompting. Useful in CI. The source env var is read and deleted from the process after writing. | no |  |  |
| `--project` | Project root (where .env lives). | no |  |  |
| `--prefix` | Vault prefix - matches the ``vault.prefix`` in kiri.yml. Defaults to ``KIRIMANA``. | no | KIRIMANA |  |
| `--force` | Overwrite an existing entry without asking. | no | False |  |
